$comment: Curated region manifest for compendium generation. Tiers: world/continents (gridless), Inner Sea meta-regions, popular nations, city environs. 'fit' frames a gazetteer (search.json) feature bbox; point features use radiusMi. Explicit center/zoom entries were hand-tuned 2026-07-17. maxZoomWithData upstream is 8; fits cap at 8.4.
